economic_ownership_map.label: Tangible loan-book equity (adjusted book)

source.locator: Adjusted book value $14.90 per share as of 2026-03-31

low.label: Bounded mark-to-market adjustment on adjusted book
low.rationale: Low applies CRE stress marks below filing book; base uses adjusted book; high allows modest premium if redeployment lifts asset marks.

source.locator: Adjusted book value $14.90 per share as of 2026-03-31

base.label: Bounded mark-to-market adjustment on adjusted book
base.rationale: Low applies CRE stress marks below filing book; base uses adjusted book; high allows modest premium if redeployment lifts asset marks.

source.locator: Adjusted book value $14.90 per share as of 2026-03-31

high.label: Bounded mark-to-market adjustment on adjusted book
high.rationale: Low applies CRE stress marks below filing book; base uses adjusted book; high allows modest premium if redeployment lifts asset marks.

source_lineage.locator: Adjusted book value $14.90 per share as of 2026-03-31

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Q1 2026 adjusted book $14.90/sh; FY2025 management fees $4.985M; loan commitments $776M at 1.3% ACL; 22.596M shares (SEVN/investor-documents/ir-sevn/SEVN-Q1-2026-Earnings-Presentation.pdf; SEVN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0001452477_26_000010.htm; SEVN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260428_rpt20260331_acc0001452477_26_000021.htm). Proof: 14.9/sh base via net_asset_value@1.0.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Marks, ACL, and leverage are inside book.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Credit losses or mark-to-market force book below the low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: External manager fee drag (Tremont/RMR)

source.locator: Management fees $4,985 thousand for year ended 2025-12-31

low.label: Capitalized years of external-manager fee drag
low.rationale: Bear capitalizes longer fee drag including incentive-fee upside; base reflects 1.5% base fee run-rate; bull assumes partial internalization or fee compression.

low.label: External manager fee drag per share

source.locator: Management fees $4,985 thousand for year ended 2025-12-31

base.label: Capitalized years of external-manager fee drag
base.rationale: Bear capitalizes longer fee drag including incentive-fee upside; base reflects 1.5% base fee run-rate; bull assumes partial internalization or fee compression.

base.label: External manager fee drag per share

source.locator: Management fees $4,985 thousand for year ended 2025-12-31

high.label: Capitalized years of external-manager fee drag
high.rationale: Bear capitalizes longer fee drag including incentive-fee upside; base reflects 1.5% base fee run-rate; bull assumes partial internalization or fee compression.

high.label: External manager fee drag per share

source_lineage.locator: Management fees $4,985 thousand for year ended 2025-12-31

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Q1 2026 adjusted book $14.90/sh; FY2025 management fees $4.985M; loan commitments $776M at 1.3% ACL; 22.596M shares (SEVN/investor-documents/ir-sevn/SEVN-Q1-2026-Earnings-Presentation.pdf; SEVN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0001452477_26_000010.htm; SEVN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260428_rpt20260331_acc0001452477_26_000021.htm). Proof: -1.5002/sh base via net_asset_value@1.0.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Fee load or internalization cost proves larger than the low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: CRE credit and capital-redeployment reserve

source.locator: Total loan commitments $776.0 million as of 2026-03-31

low.label: Allowance for credit losses as percent of commitments
Stress reserve multiple on filing ACL per share
low.rationale: Low adds CRE cycle losses and redeployment lag beyond ACL; base matches judgment reserve; high assumes clean book and faster capital deployment.

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Q1 2026 adjusted book $14.90/sh; FY2025 management fees $4.985M; loan commitments $776M at 1.3% ACL; 22.596M shares (SEVN/investor-documents/ir-sevn/SEVN-Q1-2026-Earnings-Presentation.pdf; SEVN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260218_rpt20251231_acc0001452477_26_000010.htm; SEVN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-Q_20260428_rpt20260331_acc0001452477_26_000021.htm). Proof: -1.5001/sh base via capital_structure_and_excess_return@1.0.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Rights-offering capital not yet fully earning.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Realized losses or failed redeployment push economic equity below the low case.

economic_ownership_map.label: Distributable-earnings franchise (embedded in book multiple)
economic_ownership_map.evidence: Q1 2026 DE $0.24/sh (temp dilution); Q4 2025 was $0.28/sh. Embedded in how the market capitalizes book — treated as embedded so not double-counted with book equity.
economic_ownership_map.scenario_assumptions: Earnings power is the cross-check for the book multiple, not a second stack.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: Marks, ACL, and leverage are inside book.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Dividend cut and DE permanently below coverage invalidate income-capitalization cross-checks.

facts.label: Distributable-earnings franchise (embedded in book multiple)
facts.evidence: Q1 2026 DE $0.24/sh (temp dilution); Q4 2025 was $0.28/sh. Embedded in how the market capitalizes book — treated as embedded so not double-counted with book equity.

method_route.label: Capital cycle and normalized industry economics
failure_modes: replacement cost used for assets that cannot earn their cost of capital
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

source_lineage.locator: Adjusted book value $14.90 per share as of 2026-03-31
Management fees $4,985 thousand for year ended 2025-12-31
Total loan commitments $776.0 million as of 2026-03-31

falsifiers: Credit losses or mark-to-market force book below the low case.
Fee load or internalization cost proves larger than the low case.
Realized losses or failed redeployment push economic equity below the low case.
Dividend cut and DE permanently below coverage invalidate income-capitalization cross-checks.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
